name: Python Runtime
reason: Python versions 3.8 and below are End-Of-Life (EOL) and no longer receive official security patches.
fix: Upgrade your project to Python 3.9 or higher (recommended: 3.11 or 3.12). Update your `.python-version` or Dockerfile base image.

name: Node.js Runtime
reason: Node.js versions below 18 (e.g. Node 14, 16) are End-Of-Life (EOL) and contain known critical vulnerabilities.
fix: Upgrade your Node.js runtime environment to active LTS versions (Node 18 or 20). Update the `engines` field in package.json or your Dockerfile.

name: Docker Base Image Tag
reason: Using the 'latest' tag for base Docker images makes your builds non-deterministic and can pull vulnerable packages unexpectedly.
fix: Pin your Docker base image to a specific version or SHA hash (e.g. `python:3.11-slim` instead of `python:latest`).
